## Checklist
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no warnings
- [ ] Content changes are in `lib/data.ts`, not hardcoded in components
- [ ] No personal contact info (phone/email) added to the site
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness checked
- [ ] Vercel preview URL looks correct
